title: External Affairs Minister Jaishankar meets Chinese President Xi Jinping
description: External Affairs Minister Jaishankar meets Chinese President Xi Jinping to discuss recent developments in India-China bilateral ties.
keywords: External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar, Jaishankar in China, Jaishankar meets Chinese President Xi Jinping, Jaishankar meets SCO counterparts in China, SCO summit, India-China bilateral relations
snippet:
External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar and his counterparts from the SCO member nations on Tuesday (July 15, 2025) met Chinese President Xi Jinping.
